changeSet.author: Manuel

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS result FROM public.utm_module_group WHERE module_id = 34

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.utm_module_group_configuration ( group_id, conf_key, conf_value, conf_name, conf_description, conf_data_type, conf_required, conf_options, conf_visibility ) SELECT g.id, 'office365_cloud_environment', 'Commercial', 'Cloud Environment', 'Select the Microsoft cloud environment for Office 365 integration.', 'select', false, '[ { "value": "Commercial", "label": "Commercial - Azure commercial global (Default)" }, { "value": "GCC", "label": "GCC - US Government Community Cloud" }, { "value": "GCCHigh", "label": "GCC High - US Government Community Cloud High (DoD IL4)" }, { "value": "DoD", "label": "DoD - US Department of Defense (DoD IL5)" } ]', null FROM public.utm_module_group g WHERE g.module_id = 34;
